'''Noob Hill''' was located in [[Ruan]]'s [[Refugee Facility 17]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. It was an area where, after paying [[Salliche Agricultural Corporation|Salliche Ag]], refugees fleeing the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] could attain marginally better accommodations than those available in the main facility. [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorians]], [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]], and [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]] were among the [[Species/Legends|species]] living there.
